# Scenario 3 - Large Battle Map (200x100)
# Icon 1 = Sand/Shoreline (easy passing)
# Icon 2 = Grassland (easy passing)
# Icon 3 = Swamp/Rough Terrain (slow passing)
# Icon 4 = Mountain/Water (blocked)
